author: Rohan Abhilash
name: 11L 3x MLP Seq2048 (Non-Record)
blurb: Non-record submission: architecture scaling from baseline (11 layers, 3x MLP, seq_len 2048, warmdown 2000). Post-quant val_bpb 1.1791 vs baseline 1.2244 (-3.7%). Artifact 24.5MB (over 16MB — needs int6 QAT + GPTQ + LZMA). 5611 steps in 600s on 8xH100 SXM at 107ms/step.
